name: Jalepeno Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, green chiles, and taco sauce until blended.
2. Lay a tortilla flat on a surface. Spread a thin layer of the cream cheese mixture evenly over it.
3. Roll up the tortilla tightly into a jelly roll shape.
4. Wrap each rolled tortilla in Saran wrap and refrigerate for 24 hours to 4 days.
5. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
6. After refrigeration, unwrap the rolls and slice them about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Serve on a platter with parsley or Boston lettuce and offer salsa for dipping.
7. This recipe yields approximately 80-100 slices.
